apigatewayv2.api.cors.AllowCredentials.Docs: Specifies whether credentials are included in the CORS request. Supported only for HTTP APIs.

apigatewayv2.api.cors.AllowHeaders.Docs: Represents a collection of allowed headers. Supported only for HTTP APIs.

apigatewayv2.api.cors.AllowMethods.Docs: Represents a collection of allowed HTTP methods. Supported only for HTTP APIs.

apigatewayv2.api.cors.AllowOrigins.Docs: Represents a collection of allowed origins. Supported only for HTTP APIs.

apigatewayv2.api.cors.ExposeHeaders.Docs: Represents a collection of exposed headers. Supported only for HTTP APIs.

apigatewayv2.api.cors.MaxAge.Docs: The number of seconds that the browser should cache preflight request results. Supported only for HTTP APIs.
